{ "name": "color-convert", "description": "Plain color conversion functions", "version": "2.0.1", "author": "Heather Arthur <fayearthur@gmail.com>", "license": "MIT", "repository": "Qix-/color-convert", "scripts": { "pretest": "xo", "test": "node test/basic.js" }, "engines": { "node": ">=7.0.0" }, "keywords": [ "color", "colour", "convert", "converter", "conversion", "rgb", "hsl", "hsv", "hwb", "cmyk", "ansi", "ansi16" ], "files": [ "index.js", "conversions.js", "route.js" ], "xo": { "rules": { "default-case": 0, "no-inline-comments": 0, "operator-linebreak": 0 } }, "devDependencies": { "chalk": "^2.4.2", "xo": "^0.24.0" }, "dependencies": { "color-name": "~1.1.4" } }
